scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:8080 http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/main.js dist/preload/preload.js && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dicom-pipeline/contracts && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
